text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: You want to go on a walk... with me?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! I found a spot with a nice breeze blowing!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
That does sound refreshing... Oh? I can smell the
scent of flour and butter drifting on the wind
coming from you two...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! That would be the treat we finished baking
just now! It's a special homemade cake that—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Th-that we made because we were thinking we
could have a nice picnic with everyone! Right,
Bakushin O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, er, yes, exactly! And Flower's
decorated our picnic venue in exquisite floral
fashion!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
S-say whaaat? Th-there's no venue! Because it's
not a party, it's just a picnic!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
A cake and flowers... it almost sounds like you've
prepared some sort of celebration for me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Eeeek! Wh-whatever do you mean? I've never
even heard of a Bakushin-style surprise birthday
party!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. Is that so? Then why don't we head on
over to this "picnic"?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
(A felicitous breeze blows from their direction...
Heh. It tickles a bit, but also has a comforting
warmth.)
